query: SELECT er.id, er.project_consultant_id, er.total_true_cost, er.eval_rank, er.can_rank, cm.code FROM cpa_evaluation_results er JOIN cpa_project_consultants pc ON pc.id = er.project_consultant_id JOIN cpa_consultants_master cm ON cm.id = pc.consultant_id WHERE pc.cpa_project_id = 120001 ORDER BY er.id DESC LIMIT 10
